pricingCopy: Pricing hypothesis: 99 PLN for a small report pack. Manual payment before Stripe.
productPlaceholder: e.g. cordless vacuum, office chair, wireless headphones
allegroLinksPlaceholder: One link per line. Links are references; NoiseCut does not scrape Allegro in v0.1.
competitorsPlaceholder: Offer, brand, or seller names - one per line
targetNotesPlaceholder: e.g. 150-250 PLN budget, focus on fast delivery
pastedEvidencePlaceholder: Paste reviews, listing fragments, buyer questions, complaints, or manual competitor notes.
evidenceGuidance: NoiseCut analyzes the text you paste. Allegro links are references only in v0.1 and are not fetched automatically.
evidenceBest: Best inputs: buyer reviews, Q&A, listing copy fragments, complaints, or notes about competitor weaknesses.
evidenceRequired: Paste review text, listing copy, Q&A, complaint text, or competitor notes. Allegro links are references only in v0.1.
evidenceTooShort: Pasted evidence is too short. Add at least one concrete customer or listing fragment.
betaRequired: Verify active beta access before generating a report.
invalidAllegroUrl: This link does not look like Allegro: {{url}}
sampleCopyFailed: Could not copy the evidence sample.
